title: Hiring Store Manager at Berger Silk Store

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Berger Silk Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
